contract.title: Registration Agreement
contract.subtitle: Please read the full agreement and mark your consents before signing.
contract.s1Body: "The Conservatory" — the institution detailed in the addendum. "Harmonia Platform" — the digital music education management system. "The Student" — the person registering for lessons. "Parent/Guardian" — a legal parent of a minor under 18. "Tuition" — the monthly payment including {vatRate}% VAT as detailed in the conservatory addendum.
contract.s2Body: Tuition includes {vatRate}% VAT. Studies include, by track: weekly individual lesson, music theory, ensemble playing, concerts, and enrichment activities. Minimum 33 lessons per year. Teacher assignment is at the conservatory management's discretion. In security situations/force majeure — lessons will move to online format and will count as lessons.
contract.s3Body: Absence without advance notice — no substitute lesson will be provided. Absence with at least 24 hours' notice — entitlement to up to {maxMakeups} make-up lessons per year. Lesson cancellation by the teacher — always compensated. Cancellation with less than 24 hours' notice by the student — no compensation.
contract.s4Body: Cancellation by the 15th of the month: charged only until end of that month. Cancellation from the 16th: charged until end of the following month. Last cancellation date: March 31 (or as detailed in addendum). After that date no refund will be given, except in exceptional circumstances per law. The conservatory may terminate studies with 14 days' notice for payment arrears, misconduct, or failure to meet academic requirements.
contract.s5Body: When registration was completed remotely (online, by email), the consumer has a legal right to cancel within 14 days of the transaction, without giving a reason. Money will be refunded within 14 days of receiving the cancellation notice, minus a pro-rata deduction for lessons already given. Lessons already taken cannot be cancelled.
contract.s6Body: Harmonia Platform and the conservatory collect: identity (name, ID, date of birth), contact (phone, email), pedagogical information (lessons, attendance, teacher notes), financial (credit token only via Cardcom), and media (practice recordings with consent only). Sub-processors: Google Cloud/Firebase (Belgium), Cardcom (Israel), Twilio/SendGrid (US/Europe), Google AI/Gemini. Student records kept 7 years from end of studies; financial records — 7 years.
contract.s7Body: Right of access: to receive a copy of all information stored about you. Right to rectification: to correct inaccurate information. Right to erasure: subject to legal retention obligations. Right to withdraw consent: to cancel consent to marketing/recordings at any time. Contact: privacy@harmonia.co.il — response within 30 days (extendable to 60 in justified circumstances).
contract.s8Body: Practice recordings (home practice): these are the exclusive property of the student. Harmonia and the conservatory will not use them for marketing, advertising, or AI training. Access is limited to the student, parent, and the relevant teacher only. Event/concert recordings and photos (concerts, performances, open days): these are works of the conservatory and are used for documentation and routine publication of public activities. Use for commercial/promotional purposes (e.g. campaigns, advertisements, sponsored content) requires separate consent as set out in the photos/video consent clause.
contract.s9Body: The platform strives to meet accessibility standard IS 5568 (WCAG 2.1 AA). To report: accessibility@harmonia.co.il. This agreement is subject to the laws of the State of Israel. Nothing in this agreement detracts from consumer rights under the Consumer Protection Law, 5741-1981.
contract.s10BodyDefault: No special addendum has been defined for this conservatory.
contract.readNote: After reading the agreement, confirm each consent separately:
contract.agreeRequired: You must confirm data processing and terms of use before continuing registration.
contract.consent1Label: I consent to the processing of my personal data for conservatory services
contract.consent2Label: I have read and agree to the terms of this registration agreement
contract.consent3Label: I agree to receive marketing updates about events and additional services
contract.consent4Label: I agree to the storage of practice recordings for pedagogical feedback purposes only
contract.consent5Label: I consent to the use of photos/video of the student for the conservatory's commercial and promotional purposes (campaigns, advertisements, social media — first name only). Without this consent, images in which the student is identifiable will not be published for these purposes.
contract.agreeCheckbox: I have signed the registration agreement
contract.termsBody: The Harmonia platform provides music education management services.
contract.agreeCheckboxLegacy: I have read and agree to Harmonia's Terms of Service

OpenDay.heroSubtitle: Come meet the teachers, try new instruments, and hear our students perform. A musical experience for the whole family!
OpenDay.featuresTitle: What awaits you at the Open Day?
OpenDay.feature1Desc: An opportunity to get to know our leading pedagogical team, ask questions, and receive personal guidance.
OpenDay.feature2Desc: Children can touch, feel, and play a variety of musical instruments with the guidance of our teachers.
OpenDay.feature3Desc: Watch our talented students showcase what they've learned in short concerts throughout the day.
OpenDay.formSubtitle: Book a personal introductory meeting. The number of spots is limited.
